phase_0_inventory.note: 15 candidate sources identified (3 Tier 1 bulk + 7 Tier 3 PDFs + 5 Tier 4 live pages). Full inventory at src/data/councils/pdfs/council-pdfs/kent/inventory.json. Key finding: kent.gov.uk and democracy.kent.gov.uk return 403 on all direct HTTP fetches (Cloudflare-style bot block). Phase 1 must route through Internet Archive Wayback.

known_constraints.bot_blocking: All kent.gov.uk and democracy.kent.gov.uk URLs return HTTP 403 on direct fetch. Archival routes via Wayback (2 snapshots already exist, 5 SavePageNow triggers needed).
known_constraints.cabinet_reshuffles: Reform UK leadership under Kemkaran has reshuffled Cabinet at least once post-May 2025. Current in-repo cabinet list predates the most recent reshuffle (per news.kent.gov.uk/articles/cabinet-reshuffle-at-county-hall-announced). Phase 4 will re-verify.
